title: [InstCombine] fold range checks for reassociated logical and/or
author: shadow-forge-dev
description:
Allow range check folding to look through one level of reassociated boolean logic
fixes #176554

tests.test_body:
define i1 @test_bitwise_and_reassoc(i1 %cond, i32 %y) {
  %cmp1 = icmp samesign ugt i32 %y, 65535
  %sel11 = and i1 %cond, %cmp1
  %cmp2 = icmp samesign ult i32 %y, 1114112
  %sel2 = and i1 %sel11, %cmp2
  ret i1 %sel2
}

define i1 @test_mixed_or_select(i1 %cond, i32 %y) {
  %cmp1 = icmp samesign ugt i32 %y, 1114111
  %sel11 = or i1 %cond, %cmp1
  %cmp2 = icmp samesign ult i32 %y, 65536
  %sel2 = select i1 %sel11, i1 true, i1 %cmp2
  ret i1 %sel2
}

define i1 @test_mixed_and_select(i1 %cond, i32 %y) {
  %cmp1 = icmp samesign ugt i32 %y, 65535
  %sel11 = and i1 %cond, %cmp1
  %cmp2 = icmp samesign ult i32 %y, 1114112
  %sel2 = select i1 %sel11, i1 %cmp2, i1 false
  ret i1 %sel2
}

comments.author: andjo403
comments.body:
I'm not that good on the poison handling but think that there is poison checks that are missing.
but I also think that this PR do more then it probably shall do as I understand it this PR have folds like:
(a & b) && c -> a && (b & c) IIF b & c folds. but if some value is poison will this be correct? 
think that all following already is folded before this PR and most are missing test in this PR:
  (a && b) && c -> a && (b & c) IIF b & c folds 
  (a && b) & c -> a && (b & c) IIF b & c folds 
this cases looks a bit strange as we go from binary ops to one logical + one binary :
  (a & b) & c -> a && (b & c) IIF b & c folds 
  (b & a) & c -> b && (a & c) IIF a & c folds 
  c & (a & b) -> a && (b & c) IIF b & c folds 
  c & (b & a) -> b && (a & c) IIF a & c folds 

but maybe I missunderstand the functionality. 

the test test_bitwise_and_reassoc already folds befor this PR

eg (a && b) && c that is already handled in https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/blob/30969cc6441261a4281bdb9811c36a2348137d61/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineSelect.cpp#L3639-L3647 but there there is a check for poison

also missing proofs that show that the folds are allowed see https://llvm.org/docs/InstCombineContributorGuide.html
